page: Microsoft Azure DS1_v2 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DSv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a single dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL physical core based on the x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 2.6 GHz. The processor includes 32 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 35 MB of L3 cache, with hardware support for AVX, AVX-512F, AES, and FMA instructions. The instance is equipped with 4.0 GB of memory and includes 7 GB of local storage, with no integrated GPU.

Benchmark results position this instance in the lower performance tiers. The single-core stress-ng CPU performance score is 1206.69, and the Geekbench single-core score is 1008.0, both falling into the bottom 25% of tested hardware. Multi-core and multi-threaded benchmarks, such as the Geekbench multi-core score of 1042.0 and the Passmark CPU score of 1456.03, rank in the bottom 10% due to the single-core constraint. Memory bandwidth is also limited, with uncached read and write speeds of 12.1 GB/sec and 9.45 GB/sec respectively. Redis SET operations achieve 1.25 million operations per second, and static web serving throughput is recorded at 1.26 GB/sec.

Given its single-core configuration and modest memory capacity, the DS1_v2 represents a highly cost-efficient entry-level tier for workloads with minimal resource demands. It is not suitable for parallel processing, heavy database operations, or large-scale LLM inference. Instead, this virtual machine is best suited for lightweight general-purpose tasks, basic web serving, small-scale utility scripting, development testing, and running minor background processes that do not require high memory bandwidth or multi-threaded compute power.
description: Microsoft Azure DS1_v2 is an entry-level, general-purpose virtual machine from the DSv2 family, powered by a single dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL core running at 2.6 GHz. It features 4.0 GB of memory, 7 GB of local storage, and no GPU. Performance benchmarks place this instance in the lower tiers, with a single-core Geekbench score of 1008.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 1456.03. Memory bandwidth is limited, reaching 12.1 GB/sec for uncached reads and 9.45 GB/sec for writes. Static web serving throughput is 1.26 GB/sec, and Redis SET operations reach 1.25 million operations per second. This highly cost-efficient, low-resource configuration is best suited for lightweight, single-threaded workloads, basic web serving, development testing, and simple background utility tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DS1_v2 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 1 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPU, 4.0 GB of memory, and 7 GB of local storage, designed for lightweight, entry-level workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DS1_v2 is a 1-vCPU general-purpose VM with 4.0 GB RAM and 7 GB local storage, suitable for lightweight entry-level workloads.
tagline: A cost-efficient, single-core virtual machine with balanced memory and local storage for entry-level utility workloads and basic web serving.

4.0 GB of system memory and 7 GB of local storage
Supports AVX, AVX-512F, and AES instruction sets
Best suited for lightweight, single-threaded applications
Cost-efficient profile for development and testing environments
